sections.title: B: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Review: Block 1 – Units 1 & 2. **SINCE**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 1 – Units 1 & 2.
items.answer: has been using its new curriculum since

items.sentence:
Leo began the study group before the lesson on Review: Block 1 – Units 1 & 2. **COME**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 1 – Units 1 & 2.
items.answer: come up with a plan to deal

The school club ...... before the lesson on Review: Block 1 – Units 1 & 2.
